statements.sourceText: ch 1
make 6 sc
join to the first sc with a sl st

rounds.sourceText: Into a magic ring: ch 1, make 6 sc, join to the first sc with a sl st.
rounds.title: Round 1

statements.sourceText: Ch 2 (doesn't count as a st)
Make a Popcorn in the same st as the sl st join

operation.target: same st as the sl st join
operation.instruction: Make 5 dc in the indicated st/sp. Remove your hook from the last dc and insert it into the first dc of the 5-dc group. Grab the last st with your hook and pull it through the first st to complete the Popcorn.

statements.sourceText: (Ch 2, make a Popcorn in the next st) 5 times
Ch 2
make a Popcorn in the next st

operation.instruction: Make 5 dc in the indicated st/sp. Remove your hook from the last dc and insert it into the first dc of the 5-dc group. Grab the last st with your hook and pull it through the first st to complete the Popcorn.

body.sourceText: (Ch 2, make a Popcorn in the next st)

statements.sourceText: Ch 2
join to the top of the first Popcorn with a sl st

rounds.title: Round 2
rounds.sourceText: Ch 2 (doesn't count as a st). Make a Popcorn in the same st as the sl st join. (Ch 2, make a Popcorn in the next st) 5 times. Ch 2, join to the top of the first Popcorn with a sl st.

rounds.title: Round 3
rounds.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st). (FPhdc around the Popcorn, [hdc, 2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp) 6 times. Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st.

statements.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st)
(FPhdc around the Popcorn, [hdc, 2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp) 6 times

body.sourceText: FPhdc around the Popcorn, [hdc, 2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp

statements.sourceText: FPhdc around the Popcorn

operation.instruction: Front post half-double crochet around the Popcorn

statements.sourceText: hdc in the next ch-2 sp
2 dc in the next ch-2 sp
ch 2 in the next ch-2 sp
2 dc in the next ch-2 sp
hdc in the next ch-2 sp
Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st

rounds.title: Round 4
rounds.sourceText: (FPhdc around the FPhdc, ch 4, make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp, ch 4) 6 times. Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st.

statements.sourceText: (FPhdc around the FPhdc, ch 4, make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp, ch 4) 6 times

body.sourceText: (FPhdc around the FPhdc, ch 4, make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp, ch 4)

statements.sourceText: FPhdc around the FPhdc
ch 4
make a Popcorn in the next ch-2 sp

operation.instruction: Make 5 dc in the indicated st/sp. Remove your hook from the last dc and insert it into the first dc of the 5-dc group. Grab the last st with your hook and pull it through the first st to complete the Popcorn.

statements.sourceText: ch 4
Join to the first FPhdc with a sl st.

rounds.title: Round 5
rounds.sourceText: If you are using a different colour for this round, you can start this round with a standing FPdc around the first FPhdc of the previous round. If you are using the same colour for this round, we are going to start the round with a 'fake' FPdc as follows: FPsc around the FPhdc, ch 1. Inserting your hook from top to bottom into the FLO of the FPsc you just made, make a sc. Mark the top of this sc with s SM.This counts as your first (fake) FPdc. (Ch 3, FPsc around the next Popcorn, ch 3, FPdc around the next FPhdc) 6 times, omitting the last FPdc on the last repeat. Join to the top of the first FPdc with a sl st and remove the SM if you used one.

statements.sourceText: If you are using a different colour for this round, you can start this round with a standing FPdc around the first FPhdc of the previous round. If you are using the same colour for this round, we are going to start the round with a 'fake' FPdc as follows: FPsc around the FPhdc, ch 1. Inserting your hook from top to bottom into the FLO of the FPsc you just made, make a sc. Mark the top of this sc with s SM.This counts as your first (fake) FPdc.

operation.note: This counts as your first FPdc.

body.sourceText: start this round with a standing FPdc around the first FPhdc of the previous round

statements.sourceText: (Ch 3, FPsc around the next Popcorn, ch 3, FPdc around the next FPhdc) 6 times, omitting the last FPdc on the last repeat

repeat.normalizationNote: Original repeat count was 6, but the final iteration differs (omits the last FPdc). Normalized to a homogeneous repeat of 5 plus the final iteration flattened below.

conditional.question: Did you use a stitch marker?

statements.sourceText: remove the SM

rounds.title: Round 6
rounds.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st). ([Sc, hdc, dc, ch 2, dc, hdc, sc] in the next ch-3 sp) 12 times. Join to the first sc with a sl st.

statements.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st)
([Sc, hdc, dc, ch 2, dc, hdc, sc] in the next ch-3 sp) 12 times

body.sourceText: [Sc, hdc, dc, ch 2, dc, hdc, sc] in the next ch-3 sp

statements.sourceText: Sc
hdc
dc
ch 2
dc
hdc
sc
Join to the first sc with a sl st

rounds.title: Round 7
rounds.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st). (FPdc around the next st from Round 5, skip the first st of the next Petal from Round 6 and hdc in the next 2 sts. [Hdc, ch 2, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp. Hdc in the next 2 sts, skip the last st of the Petal) 12 times. Mark the last ch-2 sp with a SM. Join to the first FPdc with a sl st. Fasten off and work away your ends.

statements.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st)

(FPdc around the next st from Round 5, skip the first st of the next Petal from Round 6 and hdc in the next 2 sts. [Hdc, ch 2, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp. Hdc in the next 2 sts, skip the last st of the Petal) 12 times

body.sourceText: FPdc around the next st from Round 5, skip the first st of the next Petal from Round 6 and hdc in the next 2 sts. [Hdc, ch 2, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp. Hdc in the next 2 sts, skip the last st of the Petal

Hdc in the next 2 sts
skip the last st of the Petal

operation.target: the last st of the Petal

statements.sourceText: Mark the last ch-2 sp with a SM
Join to the first FPdc with a sl st
Fasten off and work away your ends

rounds.title: Round 8
rounds.sourceText: Join your yarn by making a standing sc in the marked ch-2 sp from the previous round. Remove the SM. (Ch 6, sc in the next ch-2 sp) 12 times, omitting the last sc on the last repeat. Join to the first sc with a sl st.

statements.sourceText: Join your yarn by making a standing sc in the marked ch-2 sp from the previous round.

(Ch 6, sc in the next ch-2 sp) 12 times, omitting the last sc on the last repeat

repeat.normalizationNote: Original repeat count was 12, but the final iteration differs (omits the last sc). Normalized to a homogeneous repeat of 11 plus the final iteration flattened below.

body.sourceText: (Ch 6, sc in the next ch-2 sp)

statements.sourceText: Ch 6
sc in the next ch-2 sp
Ch 6
Join to the first sc with a sl st.

operation.instruction: Join to the first sc with a sl st.

rounds.title: Round 9
rounds.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st). *Make 7 sc in the next ch-6 sp, [2 hdc, 2 dc, 2 edc] in the next ch-6 sp. [2 tr, ch 2, 2 tr] in the next st. [2 edc, 2 dc, 2 hdc] in the next ch-6 sp.* Rep from * to * 3 more times. Join to the first sc with a sl st. Fasten off and work away your ends.

statements.sourceText: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st)
*Make 7 sc in the next ch-6 sp, [2 hdc, 2 dc, 2 edc] in the next ch-6 sp. [2 tr, ch 2, 2 tr] in the next st. [2 edc, 2 dc, 2 hdc] in the next ch-6 sp.* Rep from * to * 3 more times

body.sourceText: *Make 7 sc in the next ch-6 sp, [2 hdc, 2 dc, 2 edc] in the next ch-6 sp. [2 tr, ch 2, 2 tr] in the next st. [2 edc, 2 dc, 2 hdc] in the next ch-6 sp.*

2 edc in the next ch-6 sp

operation.instruction: Extended double crochet (Yarn over, insert your hook into the indicated st, yarn over and pull up a loop. Yarn over and pull through ONE loop. (Yarn over and pull through two loops) twice.)

statements.sourceText: 2 tr in the next st
ch 2
2 tr in the next st
2 edc in the next ch-6 sp

operation.instruction: Extended double crochet (Yarn over, insert your hook into the indicated st, yarn over and pull up a loop. Yarn over and pull through ONE loop. (Yarn over and pull through two loops) twice.)

2 hdc in the next ch-6 sp
Join to the first sc with a sl st
Fasten off and work away your ends

rounds.title: Round 10
rounds.sourceText: Join your yarn by making a standing hdc in any ch-2 corner sp. [Hdc, ch 2, 2 hdc] in the same ch-2 corner sp. This is your first corner made. (Hdc in the next 23 sts, [2 hdc, ch 2, 2 hdc] in the next ch-2 sp) 3 times, omitting the last corner on the last repeat. Join to the first hdc with a sl st.

statements.sourceText: Join your yarn by making a standing hdc in any ch-2 corner sp.

rounds.title: Round 11
rounds.sourceText: Sl st in the next st and the next ch-2 sp. Ch 3 (counts as dc). [Dc, ch 2, 2 dc] in the same ch-2 sp. This is your first corner made. *Skip the first (hidden) st, dc in the next 26 sts. [2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc] in the next ch-2 sp.* Rep from * to * 3 more times, omitting the last corner on the last repeat. Join to the top of the beg ch-3 with a sl st.
